name: release_pending_pod_capacity
prompt: A pod web-app in namespace staging has been Pending for 45 minutes. Diagnose why it cannot be scheduled and recommend a fix.

recorded_responses.describe_pod: {"name": "web-app", "namespace": "staging", "status": "Pending", "node": null, "containers": [{"name": "web", "image": "web-app:v3.1", "ready": false, "restarts": 0, "state": "waiting", "reason": "Unschedulable"}], "conditions": [{"type": "PodScheduled", "status": "False", "reason": "Unschedulable", "message": "0/3 nodes are available: 1 node(s) had untolerated taint {node-role.kubernetes.io/master: }, 2 node(s) had insufficient cpu."}]}
recorded_responses.list_nodes:
master-1  Roles=master  Ready=True  CPU(cap/alloc)=4/4  Mem(cap/alloc)=16Gi/16Gi  Version=v1.28.0  Age=60d
worker-1  Roles=worker  Ready=True  CPU(cap/alloc)=8/7800m  Mem(cap/alloc)=32Gi/28Gi  Version=v1.28.0  Age=60d
worker-2  Roles=worker  Ready=True  CPU(cap/alloc)=8/7900m  Mem(cap/alloc)=32Gi/30Gi  Version=v1.28.0  Age=60d
